question: Liệt kê giá đóng cửa cuối tháng của AAPL trong năm 2024.

question: Tính mức tăng phần trăm của AAPL từ đầu năm 2024 đến cuối năm 2024.
generated_sql: WITH yearly AS (   SELECT     c.ticker,     c.name,     p.date,     p.close,     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date ASC) AS rn_start,     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date DESC) AS rn_end   FROM companies c   JOIN prices p ON p.company_id = c.id   WHERE c.ticker = 'AAPL'     AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'     AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' ) SELECT   ticker,   name,   MAX(CASE WHEN rn_start = 1 THEN date END) AS start_date,   MAX(CASE WHEN rn_start = 1 THEN close END) AS start_close,   MAX(CASE WHEN rn_end = 1 THEN date END) AS end_date,   MAX(CASE WHEN rn_end = 1 THEN close END) AS end_close,   ROUND(     (       (         (MAX(CASE WHEN rn_end = 1 THEN close END) - MAX(CASE WHEN rn_start = 1 THEN close END))         / NULLIF(MAX(CASE WHEN rn_start = 1 THEN close END), 0)       ) * 100     )::numeric,     2   )::float AS return_pct FROM yearly GROUP BY ticker, name LIMIT 1

question: Có bao nhiêu phiên TSLA tăng giá so với phiên trước trong năm 2024?
generated_sql: WITH tsla_prices AS (   SELECT     c.ticker,     c.name,     p.date,     p.close,     LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date) AS prev_close   FROM companies c   JOIN prices p ON p.company_id = c.id   WHERE c.ticker = 'TSLA' ) SELECT   ticker,   name,   COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE close > prev_close) AS up_sessions_2024 FROM tsla_prices WHERE date >= DATE '2024-01-01'   AND date < DATE '2025-01-01' GROUP BY ticker, name LIMIT 5000

question: Tìm ngày NVDA tăng phần trăm mạnh nhất trong năm 2024.
generated_sql: SELECT   c.ticker,   p.date,   p.prev_close,   p.close,   ROUND((((p.close - p.prev_close) / NULLIF(p.prev_close, 0)) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS pct_change_vs_prev_day FROM (   SELECT     p.company_id,     p.date,     p.close,     LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY p.company_id ORDER BY p.date) AS prev_close   FROM prices p ) p JOIN companies c   ON c.id = p.company_id WHERE c.ticker = 'NVDA'   AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'   AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01'   AND p.prev_close IS NOT NULL ORDER BY pct_change_vs_prev_day DESC, p.date ASC LIMIT 1

question: Tìm ngày MSFT giảm phần trăm mạnh nhất trong năm 2024.
generated_sql: SELECT   c.ticker,   p.date,   p.prev_close,   p.close,   ROUND((((p.close - p.prev_close) / NULLIF(p.prev_close, 0)) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS pct_change_vs_prev_day FROM (   SELECT     p.company_id,     p.date,     p.close,     LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY p.company_id ORDER BY p.date) AS prev_close   FROM prices p ) p JOIN companies c   ON c.id = p.company_id WHERE c.ticker = 'MSFT'   AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'   AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01'   AND p.prev_close IS NOT NULL ORDER BY pct_change_vs_prev_day ASC, p.date ASC LIMIT 1

question: Tính lợi suất hằng ngày trung bình của AAPL trong năm 2024.
generated_sql: WITH daily_returns AS (   SELECT     c.ticker,     c.name,     p.date,     (p.close - LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date)) / NULLIF(LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date), 0) AS daily_return   FROM companies c   JOIN prices p ON p.company_id = c.id   WHERE c.ticker = 'AAPL'     AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'     AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' ) SELECT   ticker,   name,   MIN(date) AS start_date,   MAX(date) AS end_date,   COUNT(daily_return) AS trading_days_used,   ROUND(AVG(daily_return)::numeric, 6)::float AS average_daily_return,   ROUND((AVG(daily_return) * 100.0)::numeric, 4)::float AS average_daily_return_pct FROM daily_returns WHERE daily_return IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ticker, name LIMIT 5000

question: Tính độ lệch chuẩn lợi suất ngày của AAPL trong năm 2024 (volatility).
generated_sql: WITH daily_returns AS (   SELECT     c.ticker,     c.name,     p.date,     (p.close - LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date))       / NULLIF(LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date), 0) AS daily_return   FROM companies c   JOIN prices p ON p.company_id = c.id   WHERE c.ticker = 'AAPL'     AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'     AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' ) SELECT   ticker,   name,   MIN(date) AS start_date,   MAX(date) AS end_date,   COUNT(daily_return) AS trading_days_used,   ROUND(STDDEV_SAMP(daily_return)::numeric, 6)::float AS daily_return_volatility,   ROUND((STDDEV_SAMP(daily_return) * 100.0)::numeric, 4)::float AS daily_return_volatility_pct FROM daily_returns WHERE daily_return IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ticker, name LIMIT 5000

question: Tính drawdown lớn nhất của NVDA trong năm 2024.
generated_sql: WITH price_path AS (   SELECT     c.ticker,     c.name,     p.date,     p.close,     MAX(p.close) OVER (       PARTITION BY c.ticker       ORDER BY p.date       ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW     ) AS running_peak   FROM companies c   JOIN prices p     ON p.company_id = c.id   WHERE c.ticker = 'NVDA'     AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'     AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' ), drawdowns AS (   SELECT     ticker,     name,     date,     close,     running_peak,     (close - running_peak) / NULLIF(running_peak, 0) AS drawdown   FROM price_path ) SELECT   ticker,   name,   date AS max_drawdown_date,   close,   running_peak,   drawdown AS max_drawdown FROM drawdowns ORDER BY drawdown ASC NULLS LAST, date ASC LIMIT 1

question: Có bao nhiêu ngày NVDA có volume cao hơn gấp đôi volume trung bình 20 ngày trước đó trong năm 2024?
generated_sql: WITH nvda_prices AS (   SELECT     p.date,     p.volume,     AVG(p.volume) OVER (       ORDER BY p.date       ROWS BETWEEN 20 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING     ) AS avg_prev_20d_volume,     COUNT(p.volume) OVER (       ORDER BY p.date       ROWS BETWEEN 20 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING     ) AS prev_20d_count   FROM companies c   JOIN prices p     ON c.id = p.company_id   WHERE c.ticker = 'NVDA'     AND p.date >= DATE '2023-01-01'     AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' ) SELECT   'NVDA' AS ticker,   COUNT(*) AS days_volume_gt_2x_prev_20d_avg_in_2024 FROM nvda_prices WHERE date >= DATE '2024-01-01'   AND date < DATE '2025-01-01'   AND prev_20d_count = 20   AND volume > 2 * avg_prev_20d_volume LIMIT 5000

question: Tìm các ngày AAPL có biên độ high-low lớn hơn 5% trong năm 2024.
generated_sql: SELECT   c.ticker,   c.name,   p.date,   p.high,   p.low,   ROUND((((p.high - p.low) / NULLIF(p.low, 0)) * 100.0)::numeric, 4)::float AS high_low_range_pct FROM companies c JOIN prices p ON p.company_id = c.id WHERE c.ticker = 'AAPL'   AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'   AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01'   AND ((p.high - p.low) / NULLIF(p.low, 0)) > 0.05 ORDER BY p.date ASC LIMIT 5000

question: Mức tăng phần trăm của NVDA từ đầu năm 2023 đến cuối năm 2024.
generated_sql: WITH windowed AS (   SELECT     c.ticker,     c.name,     p.date,     p.close,     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date ASC) AS rn_start,     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date DESC) AS rn_end   FROM companies c   JOIN prices p     ON p.company_id = c.id   WHERE c.ticker = 'NVDA'     AND p.date >= DATE '2023-01-01'     AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' ) SELECT   ticker,   name,   MAX(CASE WHEN rn_start = 1 THEN date END) AS start_date,   MAX(CASE WHEN rn_start = 1 THEN close END) AS start_close,   MAX(CASE WHEN rn_end = 1 THEN date END) AS end_date,   MAX(CASE WHEN rn_end = 1 THEN close END) AS end_close,   ROUND(     (       (         MAX(CASE WHEN rn_end = 1 THEN close END) - MAX(CASE WHEN rn_start = 1 THEN close END)       ) / NULLIF(MAX(CASE WHEN rn_start = 1 THEN close END), 0) * 100     )::numeric,     2   )::float AS return_pct FROM windowed GROUP BY ticker, name LIMIT 1

question: Tìm tháng có tổng volume cao nhất của TSLA trong năm 2024.
generated_sql: SELECT   c.ticker,   c.name,   DATE_TRUNC('month', p.date)::date AS month,   SUM(p.volume) AS total_volume FROM companies c JOIN prices p   ON c.id = p.company_id WHERE c.ticker = 'TSLA'   AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'   AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' GROUP BY c.ticker, c.name, DATE_TRUNC('month', p.date) ORDER BY total_volume DESC, month ASC LIMIT 1

question: Liệt kê 10 ngày AAPL có volume thấp nhất trong năm 2024.
generated_sql: SELECT   c.ticker,   c.name,   p.date,   p.volume,   p.close FROM companies c JOIN prices p   ON p.company_id = c.id WHERE c.ticker = 'AAPL'   AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'   AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01'   AND p.volume IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p.volume ASC NULLS LAST, p.date ASC LIMIT 10

question: Tính giá trung bình close của AAPL theo từng quý trong năm 2024.
generated_sql: SELECT   c.ticker,   c.name,   DATE_TRUNC('quarter', p.date)::date AS quarter_start,   AVG(p.close) AS average_close_price FROM companies c JOIN prices p ON p.company_id = c.id WHERE c.ticker = 'AAPL'   AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'   AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' GROUP BY c.ticker, c.name, DATE_TRUNC('quarter', p.date) ORDER BY quarter_start ASC LIMIT 5000

question: Trong nhóm AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, TSLA — mã nào có volume cao nhất vào ngày 2024-06-03?
generated_sql: SELECT   c.ticker,   c.name,   p.date,   p.volume FROM companies c JOIN prices p   ON p.company_id = c.id WHERE c.ticker IN ('AAPL', 'MSFT', 'NVDA', 'TSLA')   AND p.date = DATE '2024-06-03' ORDER BY p.volume DESC NULLS LAST, c.ticker ASC LIMIT 1

question: Top 5 ngày trong năm 2024 NVDA có giá đóng cửa cao nhất.
generated_sql: SELECT c.ticker, c.name, p.date, p.close FROM companies c JOIN prices p ON p.company_id = c.id WHERE c.ticker = 'NVDA'   AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'   AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' ORDER BY p.close DESC NULLS LAST, p.date DESC LIMIT 5

question: Tìm các ngày AAPL có volume cao hơn gấp đôi volume trung bình 30 ngày trước đó trong năm 2024.
generated_sql: WITH aapl_prices AS (   SELECT     p.date,     p.volume,     AVG(p.volume) OVER (       ORDER BY p.date       ROWS BETWEEN 30 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING     ) AS avg_prev_30d_volume,     COUNT(p.volume) OVER (       ORDER BY p.date       ROWS BETWEEN 30 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING     ) AS prev_30d_count   FROM companies c   JOIN prices p     ON c.id = p.company_id   WHERE c.ticker = 'AAPL'     AND p.date >= DATE '2023-01-01'     AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' ) SELECT   'AAPL' AS ticker,   date,   volume,   avg_prev_30d_volume FROM aapl_prices WHERE date >= DATE '2024-01-01'   AND date < DATE '2025-01-01'   AND prev_30d_count = 30   AND volume > 2 * avg_prev_30d_volume ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 5000

question: Tính MA50 của MSFT trong 50 ngày giao dịch gần nhất.
generated_sql: WITH msft_prices AS (   SELECT     c.ticker,     c.name,     p.date,     p.close,     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date DESC) AS rn   FROM companies c   JOIN prices p     ON p.company_id = c.id   WHERE c.ticker = 'MSFT' ), last_50_trading_days AS (   SELECT     ticker,     name,     date,     close   FROM msft_prices   WHERE rn <= 50 ) SELECT   ticker,   name,   date,   close,   ROUND((     AVG(close) OVER (       PARTITION BY ticker       ORDER BY date       ROWS BETWEEN 49 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW     )   )::numeric, 4)::float AS ma50 FROM last_50_trading_days ORDER BY date ASC, ticker ASC LIMIT 5000

question: Tính chuỗi phiên tăng giá dài nhất của NVDA trong năm 2024.
generated_sql: WITH price_changes AS (   SELECT     c.ticker,     c.name,     p.date,     p.close,     LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date) AS prev_close   FROM companies c   JOIN prices p     ON p.company_id = c.id   WHERE c.ticker = 'NVDA'     AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'     AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' ), up_flags AS (   SELECT     ticker,     name,     date,     close,     prev_close,     CASE WHEN prev_close IS NOT NULL AND close > prev_close THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_up   FROM price_changes ), streak_groups AS (   SELECT     ticker,     name,     date,     close,     prev_close,     is_up,     SUM(CASE WHEN is_up = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (       PARTITION BY ticker       ORDER BY date       ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW     ) AS grp   FROM up_flags ), up_streaks AS (   SELECT     ticker,     name,     MIN(date) AS streak_start_date,     MAX(date) AS streak_end_date,     COUNT(*) AS up_streak_length   FROM streak_groups   WHERE is_up = 1   GROUP BY ticker, name, grp ) SELECT   ticker,   name,   streak_start_date,   streak_end_date,   up_streak_length FROM up_streaks ORDER BY up_streak_length DESC, streak_end_date ASC LIMIT 1

question: Tính tương quan lợi suất ngày giữa AAPL và MSFT trong năm 2024.
generated_sql: WITH daily_returns AS (   SELECT     c.ticker,     p.date,     (p.close - LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date))       / NULLIF(LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date), 0) AS daily_return   FROM companies c   JOIN prices p ON p.company_id = c.id   WHERE c.ticker IN ('AAPL', 'MSFT')     AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'     AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' ), paired_returns AS (   SELECT     a.date,     a.daily_return AS aapl_daily_return,     m.daily_return AS msft_daily_return   FROM daily_returns a   JOIN daily_returns m     ON a.date = m.date    AND a.ticker = 'AAPL'    AND m.ticker = 'MSFT'   WHERE a.daily_return IS NOT NULL     AND m.daily_return IS NOT NULL ) SELECT   'AAPL' AS ticker_a,   'MSFT' AS ticker_b,   MIN(date) AS start_date,   MAX(date) AS end_date,   COUNT(*) AS paired_trading_days_used,   ROUND(CORR(aapl_daily_return, msft_daily_return)::numeric, 6)::float AS daily_return_correlation_2024 FROM paired_returns LIMIT 5000

question: Đỉnh 52 tuần của AAPL tính đến ngày 2024-12-31 là bao nhiêu?
generated_sql: SELECT   c.ticker,   c.name,   MAX(p.high) AS fifty_two_week_high_as_of_2024_12_31 FROM companies c JOIN prices p ON p.company_id = c.id WHERE c.ticker = 'AAPL'   AND p.date > DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '52 weeks'   AND p.date <= DATE '2024-12-31' GROUP BY c.ticker, c.name LIMIT 5000

question: Đáy 52 tuần của TSLA tính đến ngày 2024-12-31 là bao nhiêu?
generated_sql: SELECT   c.ticker,   c.name,   MIN(p.low) AS fifty_two_week_low_as_of_2024_12_31 FROM companies c JOIN prices p ON p.company_id = c.id WHERE c.ticker = 'TSLA'   AND p.date > DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '52 weeks'   AND p.date <= DATE '2024-12-31' GROUP BY c.ticker, c.name LIMIT 5000

question: Tính volatility (STDDEV lợi suất ngày) của NVDA trong năm 2024.
generated_sql: WITH daily_returns AS (   SELECT     c.ticker,     c.name,     p.date,     (p.close - LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date))       / NULLIF(LAG(p.close) OVER (PARTITION BY c.ticker ORDER BY p.date), 0) AS daily_return   FROM companies c   JOIN prices p     ON p.company_id = c.id   WHERE c.ticker = 'NVDA'     AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'     AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01' ) SELECT   ticker,   name,   MIN(date) AS start_date,   MAX(date) AS end_date,   COUNT(daily_return) AS trading_days_used,   ROUND(STDDEV_SAMP(daily_return)::numeric, 6)::float AS daily_return_volatility,   ROUND((STDDEV_SAMP(daily_return) * 100.0)::numeric, 4)::float AS daily_return_volatility_pct FROM daily_returns WHERE daily_return IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ticker, name LIMIT 5000

question: Trong năm 2024, có bao nhiêu ngày AAPL có giá đóng cửa trên 200 USD?
generated_sql: SELECT   c.ticker,   c.name,   COUNT(*) AS days_close_above_200_2024 FROM companies c JOIN prices p ON p.company_id = c.id WHERE c.ticker = 'AAPL'   AND p.date >= DATE '2024-01-01'   AND p.date < DATE '2025-01-01'   AND p.close > 200 GROUP BY c.ticker, c.name LIMIT 5000

question: Có bao nhiêu công ty thuộc sector Technology trong database?
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS technology_company_count FROM companies WHERE sector = 'Technology' LIMIT 5000

question: Top 3 mã có market cap lớn nhất trong fundamentals (lấy giá trị mới nhất).
generated_sql: WITH latest_fundamentals AS (   SELECT     f.company_id,     f.as_of_date,     f.market_cap,     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (       PARTITION BY f.company_id       ORDER BY f.as_of_date DESC, f.id DESC     ) AS rn   FROM fundamentals f ) SELECT   c.ticker,   c.name,   lf.as_of_date,   lf.market_cap FROM latest_fundamentals lf JOIN companies c   ON c.id = lf.company_id WHERE lf.rn = 1 ORDER BY lf.market_cap DESC NULLS LAST, c.ticker ASC LIMIT 3
